# APT packages to install on a fresh machine
# One package per line. Lines starting with # are ignored.
# This is the install manifest — edit this list to change what setup.sh installs.
# Do NOT confuse with packages.txt which is the auto-generated live snapshot.

curl
git
zsh
gh
jq
htop
pipx
python3-pip
python3-venv
unzip
lynx
npm
ripgrep
